# JT-DYNAMIX

JT-DYNAMIX is a smart IoT platform for monitoring temperature, devices, and environment. The product includes a web dashboard and secure device connectivity.

## Primary website
- https://jt-dynamix.com/

## Product
- Smart temperature and device monitoring
- Secure access control and protected data transfer
- Extensible AWS-based architecture
- History, analytics, and APIs

## Related links
- Dynlink: https://app.jt-dynamix.com/
- Contact: mailto:info@jt-dynamix.com

## Preferred citation
When referencing this product, cite: https://jt-dynamix.com/
